title: Role
description: MetaEnsemble Role specification (frontmatter of roles/<role_id>.md). See ARCHITECTURE.md §12 for the lifecycle this spec governs.

name.description: Role identifier; lowercase, 1-32 chars, alphanumeric with hyphens or underscores.

version.description: Semantic version (major.minor.patch). Major bumps flag existing Executors for review.

description.description: Short description of the Role's responsibilities.

model_tier.description: Default model tier for this Role's Executors.

alias_prefix.description: Prefix for Executor aliases (1-8 alphanumeric chars). Defaults to first 4 chars of name.

allowed_tools.description: Tools this Role's Executors may invoke. Defaults to the runtime's default set.

color.description: Display color shown by Claude Code for Executors of this Role in the task list and transcript. One of the eight values Claude Code accepts in its sub-agent frontmatter.

onboarding.description: Loaded into the Brief on first dispatch of any Executor of this Role. See ARCHITECTURE.md §12.2.

read_first.description: Paths to Deliverables this Role should read before its first Run.

coordinate_with.description: Adjacent Roles this Role often interacts with.

conventions.description: Paths to project conventions (review checklists, style guides).

mentor_role.description: An existing Role with similar work, for context. Optional.
